task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Oscar EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (typically showing the user 'oscardoc' or the main menu).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the vaccine or immunization inventory management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screen or module related to 'Prevention', 'Immunizations', 'Vaccines', or 'Inventory' is open.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the correct vaccine lot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific lot number 'ADC-AUDIT-25' and vaccine name 'Adacel' are visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent updated the quantity to the expected audit value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quantity or doses remaining field for lot 'ADC-AUDIT-25' has been changed to '12' (from the initial 25).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent saved the updated inventory record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save', 'Update', or 'Submit' button is clicked, a success confirmation message is displayed, or the inventory list is shown with the updated quantity of 12 permanently reflected.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oscar EMR web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is interacting with a web browser showing the Oscar EMR GUI, not using terminal commands, curl, or direct SQL queries to update the database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual EMR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a real browser window with the Oscar EMR application, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter the text of the webpage to show '12'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target system is Oscar EMR. The correct credentials are Username: oscardoc, Password: oscar, PIN: 1117. The target vaccine is Adacel (a Tdap vaccine). The specific lot number to be updated is 'ADC-AUDIT-25'. The initial quantity in the system is 25, and it must be updated to exactly 12.
